claimText: UT Austin acceptable-use guidance says the CISO must review AI tools before procurement, development, deployment, or use when the tools are intended to autonomously make, or be a controlling factor in making, consequential decisions.
normalizedValue: CISO review required for consequential-decision AI uses.

citation.citationTitle: Acceptable Use of Generative AI Tools | UT Austin Information Security Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
